## RequestAuthorizer type

Synchronous request authorizer used by `pi-ws` guards.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export type RequestAuthorizer = (
  request: AuthorizationRequest,
) => AuthorizationResult;
```

**References:** [AuthorizationRequest](./pi-ws.authorizationrequest.md)<!-- -->, [AuthorizationResult](./pi-ws.authorizationresult.md)

## Remarks

Authorizers are intentionally synchronous to keep route handling simple and predictable with `uWebSockets.js`<!-- -->. If you need asynchronous or external auth, use `PiWs.use()` and implement the route directly against `uWebSockets.js`<!-- -->.
